name: Mad Skills Motocross 2
author: Poki
description: Mad Skills Motocross 2 is a side-scrolling racing game that delivers high-speed thrills and intense competition! Race through challenging tracks, perform epic jumps, and outpace your rivals to claim victory. Upgrade your motorbike for better speed and control, and customize your bike and rider to match your style. Do you have what it takes to be the fastest motocross racer ever? How to play Mad Skills Motocross 2? Throttle: W, the up arrow key, or the space bar Brake: S or the down arrow key Position Your Motorbike: Use the A and D or left and right arrow keys to perform front flips and backflips Who created Mad Skills Motocross 2? Mad Skills Motocross 2 is created by Turborilla. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Mad Skills Motocross 2 for free? You can play Mad Skills Motocross 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Mad Skills Motocross 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Mad Skills Motocross 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
